role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script identification (Devanagari) and language (Hindi).
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed soil color, vegetation type, and terrain features.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified tree species (Neem) and forest biome.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed infrastructure standards (drainage, poles) and script usage.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture, utility hardware) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified India. The specialists provided strong, image-grounded evidence (Devanagari script, Neem trees, specific infrastructure). The tournament logic was sound, correctly using script to eliminate Pakistan and infrastructure to eliminate Nepal.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Soil and vegetation descriptions match image.
